description: We are given a h5 file, and the website asks for a signature.

children.value: file, and the website asks for a signature.

props.code:
import numpy as np
from tensorflow.keras.models import load_model
model = load_model('model.h5')
model.input_shape # (None, 96, 128, 1)
model.summary()
props.className: language-python shiki shiki-themes one-light one-dark-pro monokai
language-text shiki shiki-themes one-light one-dark-pro monokai

children.value: It seems to output 1 or values near 1 for almost everything, that means that is probably the wrong value.
We would want a image that will give us lower outputs.
I used almighty Adam with a learning rate of 0.01. It was able to converge very quickly within 100 epoch, but I ran it til 2000 epochs to be safe.

props.code:
import tensorflow as tf

input_tensor = tf.Variable(input_data, dtype=tf.float32)

def loss_fn(input_tensor):
    prediction = model(input_tensor[tf.newaxis, ...])
    return prediction
optimizer = tf.keras.optimizers.Adam(learning_rate=0.01)
epochs = 2000
for epoch in range(epochs):
    with tf.GradientTape() as tape:
        loss = loss_fn(input_tensor)
    gradients = tape.gradient(loss, [input_tensor])
    optimizer.apply_gradients(zip(gradients, [input_tensor]))
    if epoch % 100 == 0:
        print(f'Epoch {epoch}, Loss: {loss.numpy()}')

optimized_input = input_tensor.numpy()
props.className: language-python shiki shiki-themes one-light one-dark-pro monokai

children.value: The final optimized image is very sketchy but it works. (I made 2)

props.code:
from PIL import Image
import numpy as np
import base64
import requests

image_data = optimized_input.reshape((96, 128))
image_data = (image_data - image_data.min()) / (image_data.max() - image_data.min()) * 255
image_data = image_data.astype(np.uint8)
image = Image.fromarray(image_data, mode='L')
image.save('optimized_output.png')

with open('optimized_output.png', 'rb') as image_file:
    encoded_image = base64.b64encode(image_file.read()).decode('utf-8')
r = requests.post("http://challs.tfcctf.com:30403/", data={'signature': "data:image/png;base64,"+encoded_image})
print(r.text)
